message:
STUCK LOOP DETECTED — Your last several actions achieved no progress. RECOVERY:
1. STOP repeating the same action. Do NOT run ls, dir, cat, Get-Content, or any other read-only inspection command again.
2. Focus on CREATING or EDITING files that are still missing or incomplete.
3. If all required files have been created, call finish() with a summary immediately.
4. If you are blocked, state what is blocking you and call finish().
5. Do NOT verify files you have already written — trust your own writes.

args.content:
STUCK LOOP DETECTED — Your last several actions achieved no progress. RECOVERY:
1. STOP repeating the same action. Do NOT run ls, dir, cat, Get-Content, or any other read-only inspection command again.
2. Focus on CREATING or EDITING files that are still missing or incomplete.
3. If all required files have been created, call finish() with a summary immediately.
4. If you are blocked, state what is blocking you and call finish().
5. Do NOT verify files you have already written — trust your own writes.
